caption:
3 Days Retreat in Chiang Mai🪷✨ @tourismthailand

Day 1🧘‍♀️ Meditation & Qi Gong session at Aleenta Retreat Chiang Mai @aleentaretreatchiangmai 🌸 Rose tea workshop & afternoon tea at Sahrey Chanta Organic

Day 2
🪷Spa treatments at Anantara Chiang Mai Resort @anantara_chiangmai 📸 Thai traditional dress dinner cruise by Thippayanjitr

Day 3 🪷 Royal Thai Lanna massage at Zira Spa @ziraspa_chiangmai 🎨 Artisan flower hairpin workshop at Kalm Village @kalm_village
Chiang Mai truly surprised me with peaceful retreats and luxurious wellness experiences , every moment felt special✨🌸This 3-day journey is designed to restore beauty, vitality, and peace of mind through the rich Lanna lifestyle🧘‍♀️
